name: The Depot Classic
description: Fresh ham, mature cheddar, tomato, crisp lettuce, home-made chutney on sourdough.

name: Welsh Rarebit Baguette
description: Caerphilly & mustard rarebit, spring onion, grilled on a crusty baguette.

name: Chicken & Pesto
description: Roast chicken, basil pesto, rocket, sun-blush tomato on ciabatta.

name: BLT
description: Streaky bacon, baby gem, tomato, proper mayo on toasted bloomer.

name: Veggie Hummus Wrap
description: Roasted veg, hummus, feta, mixed leaves in a soft wrap.

name: Brie & Cranberry
description: Creamy brie, tangy cranberry sauce, peppery rocket on a soft ciabatta. Christmas in a sandwich, all year round.

name: Steak & Onion Baguette
description: Tender sliced steak, sweet caramelised onions, melted cheese and horseradish mayo in a crusty baguette.

name: Build Your Own (Small)
description: Pick any 4 toppings, any 2 proteins. Dressing on the side.

name: Build Your Own (Large)
description: Pick any 6 toppings, any 3 proteins. Load it up.

name: Soup of the Day
description: Fresh daily. Ask in store. Served with a warm roll & butter.

name: Fully Loaded Jacket Potato
description: Crisp-skin jacket piled high with melted cheddar, crispy bacon bits, sour cream and fresh chives.

name: Pie & Peas
description: Local pie, mushy peas, proper gravy.

name: Welsh Cawl
description: Traditional Welsh lamb stew, slow-cooked with leeks, potatoes and root veg. Served with crusty bread and a wedge of Welsh cheese.

name: Fresh Pasta & Sauces
description: Hand-made pasta, pesto, fresh pasta sauce. Tonight's dinner sorted.

name: Freshly Ground Coffee
description: Flat white, latte, cappuccino, americano, mocha. Oat, almond or soya available.

name: Cold Pressed Juice
description: Rotating flavours. Ask what's fresh today.

name: Soft Drinks & Water
description: Bottled & canned, including Welsh spring water.

name: Oreo Brownies
description: Thick, fudgy chocolate brownies loaded with chunks of Oreo cookie. Rich, gooey and proper indulgent.

name: Bara Brith
description: Welsh fruit loaf, buttered. Proper.

name: White Chocolate Welsh Cakes
description: Griddled Welsh cakes filled with white chocolate buttercream — sugar-dusted, soft and buttery.

name: Depot Pots
description: Grab-and-go pots — yogurt & granola, fresh fruit, or high-protein. Made fresh in store, perfect for breakfast or a quick lunch.
